title: cynometra cerebriformis
intro: Cynometra cerebriformis, also known as the brain tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynometra cerebriformis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, particularly in traditional African medicine.
